titleStmt.title: SII 41.295: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 295. (A.R. No. 511 of 1905.) Kannanūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the right of entrance of the gōpurā in the Bhōjēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is a general order of the king remitting the taxes chōḍi (jōḍi), sūlavari, arasupēṟu, etc. on the dēvadāna villages of all Śiva and Vishṇu temples (mentioned by their names) in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam for worship and renovation of those temples. After his expedition against the Gajapati king, he is said to have made the grant which amounted to a total sum of 10,000 pon.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīgaṇātibhataye(ṇ) nam(ā) namastuṅka ciractumpi(ta) cantira cāmaracārave . trai
lokkiya nakaraārampa mulastampāya cambhave .śupamastu susavicayāṟputaya cāṟuRead cāli,vākaṉa caka
varuḻam 1000 4 100 3 10 9 mel cellāniṉṟa Icuvara saṅvaṟ(ṟa)carattu pavayoka catpūṉṟamaiRead pūṟṉamai,
yile śrīmaṉ makaārācātirāca Irācaparameccura Ariyarāyavi(p)pāṭa pāṣaikkut tappuvarāya
r kaṇṭa muvvarāyar kaṇṭa Aṭṭatikku Irāyamaṉopayaṅkara yavaṉarā
cattāpaṉācāriya piṟatāpa Urittira kecapati cattāṅka [haru*]ṇa śrī virappiṟa
tāpa virakiṣṇa tevamakārāyar coḻamaṇṭala viṣṭṭu
ṇutāṉam civatāṉam mutalāṉa teyvvattāṉaṅkaḷil coṭi
cūlavari Aracupeṟu piṟavari Uṇṭāṉa yellāmcaṟuvamāṉṉiyammā
ka tiruuḷampaṟṟiṉa taṉmacātaṉam Irāyatam nām vicaiyānakarattilum
pūṟuvamukamāka Utaiyātirikkuyeḻuntaruḷi Utaiyakiri tuṟkkamum cātittu tiru
malairāyarākuttaṉaiyum piṭittuk koṇṭu viṉikkoṇṭai nākā
ccuṉa koṇṭai koṇṭaviṭu koṇṭapaḷḷirācamaheṉ
tarapuram mutalāṉa tuṟkaṅkaḷum vāṅkikoṇṭu pratāparuttiragajapa
tikumaāraṉ virapaṟṟiraRead vīrapattira,ceṉaṉaiyum pritāparu(tu)tra gajapatipritāni pūpati
prikalātaṉ śiracantiraṉ mallukāṉu Uttaṇṭakāṉu mutalāṉa
pāṟṟiraRead pāttira,cāmantararaiyum civakkiṟamattilE piṭittukoṇṭu piṟatāparuttira
gajapatiyaiyum muṟiyaveṭṭi cimha taāttikirikku Eḻuntaruḷi poṭṭuṉūrile
tekkatampamumRead jayastampamum,nāṭṭivittu coḻamaṇṭalam tevasta(ta)āṉam tiruccillāppaḷḷi
ccimai vaṭakarai Irācairācavaḷanāṭṭu maḻanāṭṭu pāccil kūṟṟattu kiḻp(ā)lāṟṟu kaṇṇa
ṉūr nāyaṉār pocalicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil coṭi cūlavari piṟavari Aracuppeṟu
Uṭpaṭavum tirumaḻapāṭi vallam tañcāvūr tiruppūnturutti tiruvaiyāṟu tiruvaḻuntur
Irācurampāḷaiyam tiruvāñciyam tirupukalūr paḻuvūr pantaṇanallūr tiruppaṉaintāḷ tirunakari tiruṉāṅkūr
tāṭāḷaṉkoyil cikāḻi mutalāṉa Iraṇṭāṟṟu paṟṟu cirmai puvaṉakiri paṭṭaṇaccirmai Irācuraccirmai tañcāvūr
cimai viramaṭakkupaṭṭuccirmai tiruc cimai vaḻuttūr cimai pulipiṟampur cīmai kuḻittaṇṭalai cimai Uṭpaṭṭa viṭṭuṉatāṉam civatāṉaṅ
kaḷil pūṟuvam mutallāka Aramaṉaikku Iṟuttuvarukiṟa patiṉāyiram poṉ Anta Anta tevvattāṉaṅkaḷukkum caṅrānti pu
ṇṇiyakālattile kiṭṇavaṇai natitiṟtattile Uṇṭaivalli Aṉantacāyi tevariṭai mallukācaṉateva
pūṟuvammāka caṟuvamāṉiyammāka viṭṭu tammacātaṉa Irāyacamum tiruviḷampaṟṟiṉa Irāyasa piṟamā
ṉaṅkaḷilum cilācātaṉamum Eḻutivittu pūcai puṉaṟkkāram Aṅkaraṅka vaipokam tiruppaṇikaḷum cāṅkaṭaṅka(m)māka naṭattivittu koṇṭu cuka
ttile Irukkavum Inta tammattukku Atikam niṉaivaṉRead atitam niṉaipavaṉ,taṅkaḷ tāyār takappaṉāraiyum kopiṟāmaṇaraiyum vāraṇāciyilekoṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavi
vāṉākavum samatādiRead svadattādidvam guṇam puṇyapāradattān pālanam . paradattāpahāreṇa svadattām niṣmalam bhavet śrīvirūpākṣa .
Digital edition of SII 41.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
